items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic Horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the Horsebit element, cleverly incorporating dazzling crystal outer rings. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal Horsebit, showcasing a modern temperament. Black leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front detail with Horsebit, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Ophidia series GG mini tote bag. The Ophidia series reinterprets new sizes and styles, integrating the handle and shoulder strap for versatile carrying experiences. This tote bag is crafted from beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, featuring iconic double G accessories that add charm to the overall look. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen blend lining with double G, handle (12cm high), shoulder strap (28.5cm high).

items.name_en: 💖《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💖Aphrodite Small Shoulder Bag. Gucci explores the path of craftsmanship with modern design aesthetics, cleverly blending classic brand elements with beloved brand icons. This small shoulder bag features ample space, crafted from black soft leather, with a striking double-G logo on the closure. Black soft leather, black enamel brass hardware with ceramic finish, microfiber lining, inside: one zip pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (30cm high) with double-G magnetic snap, weight: approx. 0.35kg.

items.name_en: 💖【New】During Milan Fashion Week, the GG Milano handbag created by Creative Director Sabato De Sarno made its debut at the 2024 Fall/Winter show, paying tribute to Milan, the city of inspiration. This shoulder bag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft, smooth GG embossed fluff leather. The chain strap offers versatile styling options, easily creating a crossbody look.
items.name_cn:
💖【New】During Milan Fashion Week, the GG Milano handbag created by Creative Director Sabato De Sarno made its debut at the 2024 Fall/Winter show, paying tribute to Milan, the city of inspiration. This shoulder bag features a new double-G motif, crafted from soft, smooth GG embossed fluff leather. The chain strap offers versatile styling options, easily creating a crossbody look.
Fluff Leather
Glossy Light Gold Hardware
Leather Lining
Double-G
D-Ring
Includes a zip pocket with GG charm, an open pocket, and a lipstick organizer
Handle Height: 6.1cm
Removable Chain Strap (approx. 50cm)
Spring Buckle
Weight: approx. 0.5kg
Model: 806017
Size: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6cm(H)
Color: Black Embossed Leather/Original Leather
Italian Creation

items.name_en: 💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💖【New】GG Milano Mini Shoulder Bag
The GG Milano collection, created by Creative Director Sabato De Sarno, debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Fashion Week, paying homage to Milan, the city of inspiration. This handbag features a new double-G motif crafted from fluffy, soft-touch leather. The chain strap adds styling versatility, easily transitioning from shoulder to crossbody.
White fluffy leather
Glossy light gold-tone hardware
White leather lining
Double-G
D-ring buckle
1 zip pocket with GG charm, 1 open pocket, 1 lipstick compartment
Handle height: 6.1 cm
Detachable chain shoulder strap (approx. 50 cm)
Spring clip
Weight: approx. 0.5 kg
Model: 806017
Dimensions: 21(L) x 12.5(W) x 4.6(D)
Color: White full-grain/Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖【New】GG Shadow Card Holder
items.name_cn:
💖【New】GG Shadow Card Holder
The classic GG pattern is reimagined in a modern style for this new collection. This card holder is crafted in deep grey, featuring a classic interlocking letter pattern with a 3D effect. It features multiple card slots and other compartments for a practical interior.
GG Shadow deep grey canvas
Cloud print fabric lining
Interior: 8 card slots and 2 hidden slots
Exterior: 1 card slot
Open dimensions: 15 cm (W) x 12 cm (H); Closed dimensions: 7.5 cm (W) x 12 cm (H)
Weight: approx. 0.085 kg
Italian creation
Model: 802026
Dimensions: 7.5(L) x 12(W)
Color: Deep grey PVC/Lemon peel
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖【New】Gucci Body Small Double Lock Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💖【New】Gucci Body Small Double Lock Shoulder Bag
This small crossbody bag debuted at the 2024 Fall/Winter Men's Fashion Week, reimagined from a heritage design by Creative Director Sabato De Sarno. The premium leather has a grainy texture and is soft to the touch, crafted in Gucci Rosso Ancora red.
Gucci Rosso Ancora red grainy soft leather
Silver-tone hardware
Gucci logo
Interior: 1 zip pocket and 1 D-ring
Detachable adjustable shoulder strap (35 cm); Length adjustable from 76 cm to 85 cm
Model: 801887
Dimensions: 40(L) x 31(W) x 3(D)
Color: Black full-grain/Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💖【With full original green box packaging】💖【New Arrival】G brand logo symbols are reinterpreted in different ways every season. The new double G pattern design is bold and eye-catching. This handbag features a handle design and can be worn crossbody. It gives classic materials a modern touch, paired with imported cowhide hardware that is polished to match, with clear texture and fine quality.

It gives classic materials a modern touch, paired with imported cowhide hardware that is polished to match, with clear texture and fine quality.
Model: 815714.
Dimensions: 27(L) x 17(H) x 7cm(D)
Color: Canvas Brown Leather / Original Leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖【With full original green box packaging】💖【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💖【With full original green box packaging】💖【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Mini Shoulder Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This mini flap shoulder bag is carefully paired with a cotton webbing lining and features a light gold hook closure.
Beige and dark brown new GG letter pattern coated canvas
Brown leather trim, contrast color stitching
Light gold tone hardware
Red and green webbing cotton lining
Interior: 1 back pocket and 1 main compartment (with 1 open pocket)
Handle: 3cm (high)
Removable and adjustable leather shoulder strap (height 50.5cm - 55.5cm); length adjustable between 108cm and 119cm
Hook closure
Weight: approx. 0.5kg
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, Airpods, card holder, and lipstick
Model: 815211.
Dimensions: 20(L) x 14(W) x 8cm(D)
Color: Brown Leather / Original Leather.
Made in Italy

This style is suitable for both handbag and crossbody wear, with a webbing lining that pays tribute to the brand's iconic elements.

💖Complete with original retail packaging💖【New】The Padlock series makes a stunning appearance in the 2025 Early Autumn collection, unlocking various carrying styles. This style is suitable for both handbag and crossbody wear, with a webbing lining that pays tribute to the brand's iconic elements.

Acid Red leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Acid Red cotton lining
Interior: One open pocket
Exterior: One open pocket

Padlock clasp with leather key charm

Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 13cm (H) x 8cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.6kg
Color: Acid Red/Embossed.
Made in Italy
